Covenant worship-hall at hierarch-address-evening, gravity-throne floats above congregation, purple holo-glyphs describe Great Journey while oxygen-methane atmosphere swirls in devotional patterns.
Caladan conservatory at gene-bank-midnight, preserved ecology from lost planets grows under artificial sun, mist-system creates rainbow-halos around endangered flora from destroyed worlds.
Lagrange manufactory at zero-g-assembly-dawn, Earth crescent rises beyond construction-bay, welding-sparks drift in microgravity creating firefly-swarm while megastructure takes shape.
Tuchanka particle-accelerator at weapons-test-afternoon, shaped nuclear charge focuses radiation into beam, targeting-laser creates pink ionization-path through fallout-haze toward impact-range.
Titan submarine-dock at ethane-sea-floor-midnight, pressure creates exotic ice-polymorphs, sodium-lamps illuminate liquid-methane creating amber sphere beyond which darkness absolute reigns.
Ringworld storm-breaker at hurricane-intercept-twilight, thousand-kilometer weather-control-tower diverts cyclone, lightning-rods channel terawatts creating plasma-discharge visible across curvature.
Eldar webway-gate at daemon-breach-moment, wraithbone portal cracks admitting warp-entities, reality bleeds creating oil-slick chromatic distortion as immaterium invades materium.

Giedi Prime geothermal-tap at steam-eruption-dawn, black sun illuminates industrial-cathedral harvesting planetary-core-heat, superheated water vents creating white clouds against monochrome landscape.
Bespin wind-farm at jet-stream-midnight, turbines harness five-hundred-kph winds, lightning from storms below illuminates cloudbanks creating stroboscopic effect on spinning blades.
Forerunner sentinel-factory at activation-sequence-afternoon, assembly-line produces geometric constructs, hard-light welding creates blue-white flashes as AI-drones receive sentience-programming.
Pandoran floating-rock quarry at anti-gravity-extraction-morning, magnetic-cranes lift unobtanium-rich boulders, flux-vortex distortion creates shimmer around levitating stones against purple sky.
